preflight.note: off-camera: the page loads sidebar-collapsed then JS applies the profile persisted preference (~1-2s later). Settle before the railToggle normalization so the unless-check + press act on the settled state (a blind early click can over-toggle an already-expanded sidebar and fail its sidebarExpanded postcondition).
